query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'quotations' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('parentQuotationId', 'isAdditional', 'baseQuotationId', 'versionNumber', 'isLocked', 'lockedAt', 'lockedBy');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'quotations' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('parentQuotationId', 'isAdditional', 'baseQuotationId', 'versionNumber', 'isLocked', 'lockedAt', 'lockedBy');
